title: SCHC codec hardcodes buffer sizes, contributors will copy wrong limits
description: Throughout rust/lichen-schc/src/codec.rs, various functions use hardcoded buffer sizes like 256, 1500 without constants. E.g. line 510: 'let mut coap_buf = [0u8; 256]' with comment 'max LoRa frame payload (255 bytes)'. But the actual max depends on MTU configuration. A contributor copying this pattern for a different transport will get silent truncation. Consider: define SCHC_MAX_DECOMPRESSED_SIZE constant that matches actual deployment MTU, use it consistently.
